cpu: AMD Ryzen 5 2400G with Radeon Vega Graphics
notes: Game is free of glitches and errors, performance is degraded at certain times but could play game through from start to finish
title: Deliver Us The Moon: Fortuna

notes: Stuck (on what i'm assuming is an intro video) before getting to any menu, watching the back of an astronaut. Will not progress any further.
title: Deliver Us The Moon

notes: Hangs at the starting animation of the player character about 50% of the time, lots of lag and stutter, to the point of unplayability after passing the point of activating the space elevator even on minimum settings. "-force-opengl" improves texture quality, but doesn't remedy performance issues.
title: Deliver Us The Moon

notes: After launch you can see the astronaut's back only and no menu. Just press space key and the game will start.
title: Deliver Us The Moon

notes: Installing Media Foundation libraries is required. Otherwise the game gets stuck in the splash screen. ProtonDB text formatting isn't great, so instructions are on Steam: https://steamcommunity.com/app/428660/discussions/0/1735468061764944319/#c3175526477767880551
title: Deliver Us The Moon
